name: Translate & Save Both Versions
description: Translate a text input and save both the original and translated versions as artifacts

config.userPrompt:
Translate the text below into the target language. Preserve formatting, tone, paragraph structure, and any markdown.

If no target language is specified in the input, translate to Spanish.

Return ONLY the translated text — no explanations, no notes, no "Translation:" prefix.

TEXT:
{{INPUT}}
